summary: Iteration 93: Tested Subscribe button placement and Events API real data. Backend tests 8/8 passed. Code review confirms all implementations are correct. UI testing had issues with Cloudflare challenge in preview environment.
action_items: MINOR: Remove unused SubscribeButton imports from detail/booking pages (HotelDetails.jsx, CarRentalDetails.jsx, RestaurantMenu.jsx, RestaurantDetails.jsx, TravelBooking.jsx, PackageBooking.jsx, CinemaFilmDetails.jsx) - not functional issue, just code cleanup
critical_code_review_comments: SubscribeButton component correctly implements icon variant with tooltip and bg-[#082c59] styling
All 9 results pages (Hotels, Travel, Restaurants, Cinema, Events, CarRental, Banquet, Laundry, Packages) have SubscribeButton beside Heart in flex container with gap-1.5
Detail/booking pages have SubscribeButton imported but NOT rendered (correct behavior per requirements)
EventsResults.jsx has no MOCK_EVENTS fallback - uses real DB data
EventsResults.jsx correctly normalizes DB field names (event_type→type, venue_name→venue, start_date→date, doors_open→time)
Events API filter correctly handles is_active: True, None, or missing field

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - UI automation blocked by Cloudflare challenge

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 5 events in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscribe button implementation verified via code review. Events API returns 5 real events from DB. UI testing blocked by Cloudflare challenge in headless browser - may need manual verification or different testing approach.
